signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**

The highly anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** has been confirmed to slash transaction finality from 12 seconds to **150 milliseconds**, with overwhelming governance support[2][5]. This represents a fundamental performance improvement for the network.

signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**

Solana's network achieved a historic milestone with **167 million monthly token holders** and daily non-vote transactions reaching **148 million**[2]. The network has surged **10%** as of today[2].

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0% IN PRIOR MONTHS | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but above the Bank of Korea's 2% target[2]. This uptick follows January's five-month low of 2.0%, driven by lower energy prices offsetting food costs[1][3]. Rece
